case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. CALVIN M. QUAN et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT QUAN, CALVIN M. DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-15-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUL-03-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUAN, CALVIN M.
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD PURSUANT TO CCP 1033B (1)&(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCL.
